---
title: "George Stirling-Horne-Drummond"
---

## George Stirling-Horne-Drummond

**Dates:** (1813-1876)

### Description

of Blair Castle

### Biography

He married, as his second wife, Mary (d. 1855), daughter of William Hay (1788-1876) of Dunse Castle, and Mary Garstin (d. 1863), who was first cousin of Lord Seaton, Aunt Duke and Aunt Yonge. Mary Hay's sister Cordelia married (1848) her second cousin John Bargus Yonge (1821-1863), of Puslinch.

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
